de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.testgen

Class AbstractTestGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.testgen.AbstractTestGenerator
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    TGWorker.MainWindowTestGenerator

    public abstract class AbstractTestGenerator
extends Object
    Implementations of this class are used generate test cases or a given Proof.

    This class provides the full logic independent from the a user interface. Subclasses are used to realize the user interface specific functionality.

      • createProofsForTesting

        private List<Proof> createProofsForTesting(boolean removeDuplicatePathConditions,
                                 boolean removePostCondition)
        Creates a proof for each open node if the selected proof is open and a proof for each node on which the emptyModality rules was applied if the selected proof is closed.
        Parameters:
        mediator -
        removeDuplicatePathConditions - - if true no identical proofs will be created
        Returns:

      • createProofForTesting_noDuplicate

        private Proof createProofForTesting_noDuplicate(Node node,
                                      List<Proof> otherProofs,
                                      boolean removePostCondition)
                                         throws ProofInputException
        Creates a proof with the specified node as its root. If an identical proof is found in otherProofs than null will be returned instead.
        Parameters:
        node -
        otherProofs -
        removePostCondition - TODO

        Throws:
